EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} deleted the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to change the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
